record.summary: The control plane runs CoreLedger on the Postgres driver while stamped customer apps stay on libSQL/Turso: same decorator API, different driver, selected by URL scheme. The driver itself is enrahitu spec 011 and lives in the chassis (core/ledger/postgres.ts); this spec is the consuming side: local Postgres for dev, config wiring, the migration posture for control-plane tables, and proof that the whole chassis test suite passes on both drivers inside this repo.
record.title: Control plane on CoreLedger-over-Postgres
